scripts.sync:ios: if [ ! -d ios ]; then echo "ios 平台未初始化。请先执行: npm run init:ios"; exit 1; fi; if [ ! -x "$(command -v xcodebuild 2>/dev/null || echo none)" ]; then echo "未检测到 xcodebuild，需先安装完整 Xcode 并确保命令可用。"; exit 1; fi; if command -v xcode-select >/dev/null && xcode-select -p | grep -q "/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools"; then echo "当前 xcode-select 指向命令行工具，请切换为 Xcode：sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer"; exit 1; fi; if [ ! -x "$(command -v pod 2>/dev/null || echo none)" ]; then echo "未检测到 CocoaPods（pod），请先安装: sudo gem install cocoapods"; exit 1; fi; npx cap sync ios
scripts.build:ios: npm run prepare:ios; if [ ! -f ios/App/Podfile ]; then echo "未发现 iOS Podfile（当前 ios 目录可能为未完成状态）。请执行 npm run rebuild:ios 进行安全重建。"; exit 1; else npm run sync:ios; fi
scripts.rebuild:ios: rm -rf ios && npx cap add ios && npm run sync:ios
scripts.doctor:ios: if ! command -v xcode-select >/dev/null; then echo "未安装 Xcode 命令行工具。"; exit 1; fi; echo "xcode-select:" $(xcode-select -p 2>/dev/null || echo 'not set'); if xcode-select -p | grep -q "/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools"; then echo "xcode-select 当前指向 CommandLineTools。请切换：sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer"; fi; if ! command -v xcodebuild >/dev/null; then echo "未检测到 xcodebuild"; else xcodebuild -version | head -n 1; fi; if ! command -v pod >/dev/null; then echo "未检测到 CocoaPods（pod）"; else pod --version | head -n 1; fi; if [ -d ios ] && [ -f ios/App/Podfile ]; then echo "iOS 工程检测：OK（Podfile 存在）"; elif [ -d ios ]; then echo "iOS 目录存在但缺少 Podfile，建议执行 npm run rebuild:ios"; fi
